title: RamseyOS Project Membership
description: Defines the relationship between a Task and a Project. While tasks store a projectId inline for simple lookups, this collection provides an explicit membership record for querying all tasks in a project and tracking when the association was made.

taskId.description: Reference to the task document ID.

projectId.description: Reference to the project document ID.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the task was added to the project.

addedBy.description: How the membership was created: 'manual', 'triage', 'capture-convert', or null.
